title: Example 6-13 brittle material in axial fatigue for grade 30 gray cast iron

notes: This file follows Example 6-13 on p323-p324.
The gray cast iron material properties are fetched from table_a_24_gray_cast_iron.csv using ASTM number 30.
K_t is fetched from table_a_15_1.csv using d/w for a bar in tension with a transverse hole.
The brittle-material notch sensitivity q = 0.20 is entered explicitly because the textbook states it directly for cast iron in the worked example.
For the steady tensile case, the textbook does not apply K_t or K_f because the load is static.
For the fluctuating cases, the Smith-Dolan brittle-material locus is used in the first quadrant, and the cast-iron second-quadrant straight-line segment is used when sigma_m is negative.
